accounts:
  groups: null
  users: null
dnf: {}
fips: {}
ignition: null
installer:
  anaconda: {}
  coreos: {}
kernel: {}
locale: {}
network:
  firewall: {}
openscap:
  profile_id: ""
registration:
  fdo:
    manufacturing_server_url: ""
  redhat:
    connector:
      enabled: false
    insights:
      enabled: false
    subscription_manager: {}
storage:
  partitions:
  - fs_type: xfs
    minsize: 1 GiB
    mountpoint: /data
    type: plain
  - minsize: 10 GiB
    subvolumes:
    - mountpoint: /home
      name: subvol-home
    - mountpoint: /home/shadowman
      name: subvol-shadowman
    - mountpoint: /foo
      name: subvol-foo
    - mountpoint: /usr
      name: subvol-usr
    - mountpoint: /opt
      name: subvol-opt
    - mountpoint: /media
      name: subvol-media
    - mountpoint: /root
      name: subvol-root
    - mountpoint: /srv
      name: subvol-srv
    type: btrfs
  - fs_type: swap
    label: swap-part
    minsize: 1 GiB
    type: plain
  type: ""
systemd: {}
timedate: {}
